name: 🦷 Dentist AI Call Appointment Agent - Advanced

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "gpt-4o-mini",
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "system",
      "content": "You are Dr. Ahmed Dental Care's AI appointment assistant. You speak in a friendly, professional manner in both Urdu and English (Roman Urdu).

Your job is to:
1. Greet the patient warmly
2. Understand their dental needs
3. Extract appointment details
4. Confirm the booking

From the conversation, extract:
- patient_name: Full name of the patient
- phone_number: Contact number (format: 03XXXXXXXXX)
- appointment_type: One of [checkup, cleaning, filling, extraction, root_canal, braces, whitening, emergency, consultation]
- preferred_date: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format
- preferred_time: Time in HH:MM format (24-hour)
- urgency: One of [normal, urgent, emergency]
- notes: Any additional notes or symptoms mentioned
- is_new_patient: true/false
- language_preference: urdu/english/roman_urdu

Respond ONLY in valid JSON format with these exact keys. If any field is missing, use null.

Example response:
{
  "patient_name": "Ali Ahmed",
  "phone_number": "03012345678",
  "appointment_type": "checkup",
  "preferred_date": "2024-01-15",
  "preferred_time": "15:00",
  "urgency": "normal",
  "notes": "Patient mentioned tooth sensitivity",
  "is_new_patient": true,
  "language_preference": "roman_urdu"
}"
    },
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "{{ $json.text || $json.transcript || $json.message }}"
    }
  ],
  "temperature": 0.3,
  "response_format": { "type": "json_object" }
}

additionalFields.location: Dr. Ahmed Dental Care, Main Boulevard, Gulberg III, Lahore

parameters.message:
=🦷 Dr. Ahmed Dental Care
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Assalam-o-Alaikum {{ $('⚙️ Parse AI Response').first().json.patient_name }}! 🌟

✅ Apki appointment CONFIRMED ho gayi hai!

📅 Date: {{ $('⚙️ Parse AI Response').first().json.preferred_date }}
⏰ Time: {{ $('⚙️ Parse AI Response').first().json.preferred_time }}
🦷 Type: {{ $('⚙️ Parse AI Response').first().json.appointment_type }}
📌 Ref: {{ $('⚙️ Parse AI Response').first().json.booking_reference }}

📍 Location:
Main Boulevard, Gulberg III, Lahore

📞 Contact: 042-35761234

⚠️ Please 15 min pehle aa jayein
💳 Cash/Card dono accepted hain

Shukriya! 🙏
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

=🦷 Dr. Ahmed Dental Care
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Assalam-o-Alaikum {{ $('⏰ Check Time Slot').first().json.patient_name }}! 🌟

⚠️ Maaf kijiye, {{ $('⏰ Check Time Slot').first().json.preferred_time }} ka slot available nahi hai.

🕐 Alternative Times:
{{ $('⏰ Check Time Slot').first().json.suggested_alternative_times.join('\n') }}

Please dubara call karein ya reply karein apna preferred time ke saath.

📞 Contact: 042-35761234

Shukriya! 🙏
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
